## Coyote Block 2 Counter-Drone System (US)

**Date:** Sun, 30 Mar 2025 22:34:17 +0000  
**Author:** norskluftvern  
**Type:** Post  
**Link:** [http://norskluftvern.com/2025/03/31/coyote-block-2-counter-drone-system-us/](http://norskluftvern.com/2025/03/31/coyote-block-2-counter-drone-system-us/)

<!-- wp:paragraph -->
<p>The Coyote Block 2 counter-drone system is a kinetic interceptor developed by Raytheon Technologies. Designed for military air defense, the system aims to neutralize unmanned aerial threats, particularly small and medium-sized drones.</p>
<!-- /wp:paragraph -->

<!-- wp:heading {"className":""} -->
<h2 class="wp-block-heading"><strong>System Overview</strong></h2>
<!-- /wp:heading -->

<!-- wp:list -->
<ul class="wp-block-list"><!-- wp:list-item -->
<li><strong>Name:</strong>&nbsp;Coyote Block 2</li>
<!-- /wp:list-item -->

<!-- wp:list-item -->
<li><strong>Manufacturer:</strong>&nbsp;Raytheon Technologies</li>
<!-- /wp:list-item -->

<!-- wp:list-item -->
<li><strong>Country of Origin:</strong>&nbsp;United States</li>
<!-- /wp:list-item -->

<!-- wp:list-item -->
<li><strong>Type:</strong>&nbsp;Kinetic interceptor</li>
<!-- /wp:list-item -->

<!-- wp:list-item -->
<li><strong>Intended Use:</strong>&nbsp;Military air defense against unmanned aerial threats</li>
<!-- /wp:list-item --></ul>
<!-- /wp:list -->

<!-- wp:heading {"className":""} -->
<h2 class="wp-block-heading"><strong>Technical Specifications</strong></h2>
<!-- /wp:heading -->

<!-- wp:list -->
<ul class="wp-block-list"><!-- wp:list-item -->
<li><strong>Detection Capabilities:</strong><!-- wp:list -->
<ul class="wp-block-list"><!-- wp:list-item -->
<li>Integrated radar and electro-optical tracking systems</li>
<!-- /wp:list-item -->

<!-- wp:list-item -->
<li>Can be integrated with existing air defense sensors</li>
<!-- /wp:list-item --></ul>
<!-- /wp:list --></li>
<!-- /wp:list-item -->

<!-- wp:list-item -->
<li><strong>Neutralization Method:</strong><!-- wp:list -->
<ul class="wp-block-list"><!-- wp:list-item -->
<li>Kinetic interception (destroys drones via direct impact)</li>
<!-- /wp:list-item --></ul>
<!-- /wp:list --></li>
<!-- /wp:list-item -->

<!-- wp:list-item -->
<li><strong>Effective Range:</strong><!-- wp:list -->
<ul class="wp-block-list"><!-- wp:list-item -->
<li>Estimated to be several kilometers, depending on launch platform</li>
<!-- /wp:list-item --></ul>
<!-- /wp:list --></li>
<!-- /wp:list-item -->

<!-- wp:list-item -->
<li><strong>Mobility:</strong><!-- wp:list -->
<ul class="wp-block-list"><!-- wp:list-item -->
<li>Can be launched from ground-based, ship-based, or air-based platforms</li>
<!-- /wp:list-item --></ul>
<!-- /wp:list --></li>
<!-- /wp:list-item -->

<!-- wp:list-item -->
<li><strong>Deployment Mode:</strong><!-- wp:list -->
<ul class="wp-block-list"><!-- wp:list-item -->
<li>Multi-mission launcher, compatible with land and naval platforms</li>
<!-- /wp:list-item --></ul>
<!-- /wp:list --></li>
<!-- /wp:list-item --></ul>
<!-- /wp:list -->

<!-- wp:heading {"className":""} -->
<h2 class="wp-block-heading"><strong>Operational Use &amp; Effectiveness</strong></h2>
<!-- /wp:heading -->

<!-- wp:list -->
<ul class="wp-block-list"><!-- wp:list-item -->
<li><strong>Known Deployments:</strong><!-- wp:list -->
<ul class="wp-block-list"><!-- wp:list-item -->
<li>U.S. Army and U.S. Air Force have used it for counter-UAS operations</li>
<!-- /wp:list-item -->

<!-- wp:list-item -->
<li>Has been tested in multiple live-fire exercises</li>
<!-- /wp:list-item --></ul>
<!-- /wp:list --></li>
<!-- /wp:list-item -->

<!-- wp:list-item -->
<li><strong>Combat/Field Testing History:</strong><!-- wp:list -->
<ul class="wp-block-list"><!-- wp:list-item -->
<li>Successfully intercepted drones in real-world testing environments</li>
<!-- /wp:list-item -->

<!-- wp:list-item -->
<li>Demonstrated effectiveness in swarming drone scenarios</li>
<!-- /wp:list-item --></ul>
<!-- /wp:list --></li>
<!-- /wp:list-item -->

<!-- wp:list-item -->
<li><strong>Effectiveness Against Various Drone Types:</strong><!-- wp:list -->
<ul class="wp-block-list"><!-- wp:list-item -->
<li>Primarily effective against Group 1 and Group 2 drones (small and medium UAVs)</li>
<!-- /wp:list-item -->

<!-- wp:list-item -->
<li>Can engage drone swarms using multiple interceptors</li>
<!-- /wp:list-item --></ul>
<!-- /wp:list --></li>
<!-- /wp:list-item --></ul>
<!-- /wp:list -->

<!-- wp:heading {"className":""} -->
<h2 class="wp-block-heading"><strong>Notable Features &amp; Advantages</strong></h2>
<!-- /wp:heading -->

<!-- wp:list -->
<ul class="wp-block-list"><!-- wp:list-item -->
<li><strong>Key Strengths:</strong><!-- wp:list -->
<ul class="wp-block-list"><!-- wp:list-item -->
<li>High-speed interceptor with advanced guidance systems</li>
<!-- /wp:list-item -->

<!-- wp:list-item -->
<li>Capable of engaging drones beyond visual range</li>
<!-- /wp:list-item --></ul>
<!-- /wp:list --></li>
<!-- /wp:list-item -->

<!-- wp:list-item -->
<li><strong>Unique Capabilities:</strong><!-- wp:list -->
<ul class="wp-block-list"><!-- wp:list-item -->
<li>Uses an advanced warhead for high probability of kill (Pk)</li>
<!-- /wp:list-item -->

<!-- wp:list-item -->
<li>Can be launched from multiple platforms</li>
<!-- /wp:list-item --></ul>
<!-- /wp:list --></li>
<!-- /wp:list-item -->

<!-- wp:list-item -->
<li><strong>Adaptability &amp; Scalability:</strong><!-- wp:list -->
<ul class="wp-block-list"><!-- wp:list-item -->
<li>Can be integrated with larger air defense networks</li>
<!-- /wp:list-item -->

<!-- wp:list-item -->
<li>Modular design allows for future upgrades</li>
<!-- /wp:list-item --></ul>
<!-- /wp:list --></li>
<!-- /wp:list-item --></ul>
<!-- /wp:list -->

<!-- wp:heading {"className":""} -->
<h2 class="wp-block-heading"><strong>Limitations &amp; Challenges</strong></h2>
<!-- /wp:heading -->

<!-- wp:list -->
<ul class="wp-block-list"><!-- wp:list-item -->
<li><strong>Known Weaknesses:</strong><!-- wp:list -->
<ul class="wp-block-list"><!-- wp:list-item -->
<li>High cost per interceptor compared to electronic warfare alternatives</li>
<!-- /wp:list-item -->

<!-- wp:list-item -->
<li>Limited capability against larger UAVs or cruise missiles</li>
<!-- /wp:list-item --></ul>
<!-- /wp:list --></li>
<!-- /wp:list-item -->

<!-- wp:list-item -->
<li><strong>Operational Constraints:</strong><!-- wp:list -->
<ul class="wp-block-list"><!-- wp:list-item -->
<li>Requires integration with existing radar and tracking systems</li>
<!-- /wp:list-item -->

<!-- wp:list-item -->
<li>Limited endurance and may require multiple interceptors per engagement</li>
<!-- /wp:list-item --></ul>
<!-- /wp:list --></li>
<!-- /wp:list-item -->

<!-- wp:list-item -->
<li><strong>Adversary Countermeasures:</strong><!-- wp:list -->
<ul class="wp-block-list"><!-- wp:list-item -->
<li>Advanced drones with electronic countermeasures may reduce effectiveness</li>
<!-- /wp:list-item -->

<!-- wp:list-item -->
<li>Some drone swarms may overwhelm available interceptors</li>
<!-- /wp:list-item --></ul>
<!-- /wp:list --></li>
<!-- /wp:list-item --></ul>
<!-- /wp:list -->

<!-- wp:heading {"className":""} -->
<h2 class="wp-block-heading"><strong>Future Developments &amp; Upgrades</strong></h2>
<!-- /wp:heading -->

<!-- wp:list -->
<ul class="wp-block-list"><!-- wp:list-item -->
<li><strong>Planned Enhancements:</strong><!-- wp:list -->
<ul class="wp-block-list"><!-- wp:list-item -->
<li>Raytheon is working on improved guidance systems and extended range</li>
<!-- /wp:list-item --></ul>
<!-- /wp:list --></li>
<!-- /wp:list-item -->

<!-- wp:list-item -->
<li><strong>Integration with Other Systems:</strong><!-- wp:list -->
<ul class="wp-block-list"><!-- wp:list-item -->
<li>Expected to be integrated with U.S. Army’s Indirect Fire Protection Capability (IFPC)</li>
<!-- /wp:list-item --></ul>
<!-- /wp:list --></li>
<!-- /wp:list-item -->

<!-- wp:list-item -->
<li><strong>Future Deployment Plans:</strong><!-- wp:list -->
<ul class="wp-block-list"><!-- wp:list-item -->
<li>Continued testing and deployment in U.S. and allied defense forces</li>
<!-- /wp:list-item --></ul>
<!-- /wp:list --></li>
<!-- /wp:list-item --></ul>
<!-- /wp:list -->

<!-- wp:paragraph -->
<p></p>
<!-- /wp:paragraph -->

<!-- wp:paragraph -->

<!-- /wp:paragraph -->

<!-- wp:paragraph -->

<li><strong>Key Strengths:</strong><!-- wp:list -->
<ul class="wp-block-list"><!-- wp:list-item -->
<li>Provides a non-kinetic, low-cost-per-shot alternative to missile interceptors</li>
<!-- /wp:list-item -->

<!-- wp:list-item -->
<li>Capable of engaging multiple threats simultaneously</li>
<!-- /wp:list-item --></ul>
<!-- /wp:list --></li>
<!-- /wp:list-item -->

<!-- wp:list-item -->
<li><strong>Unique Capabilities:</strong><!-- wp:list -->
<ul class="wp-block-list"><!-- wp:list-item -->
<li>Uses software-defined waveforms to adapt to different threats</li>
<!-- /wp:list-item -->

<!-- wp:list-item -->
<li>Highly scalable and can be integrated with other defense systems</li>
<!-- /wp:list-item --></ul>
<!-- /wp:list --></li>
<!-- /wp:list-item -->

<!-- wp:list-item -->
<li><strong>Adaptability &amp; Scalability:</strong><!-- wp:list -->
<ul class="wp-block-list"><!-- wp:list-item -->
<li>Can be deployed on fixed sites, vehicles, or integrated into larger air defense networks</li>
<!-- /wp:list-item --></ul>
<!-- /wp:list --></li>
<!-- /wp:list-item --></ul>
<!-- /wp:list -->

<!-- wp:heading {"className":""} -->
<h2 class="wp-block-heading"><strong>Limitations &amp; Challenges</strong></h2>
<!-- /wp:heading -->

<!-- wp:list -->
<ul class="wp-block-list"><!-- wp:list-item -->
<li><strong>Known Weaknesses:</strong><!-- wp:list -->
<ul class="wp-block-list"><!-- wp:list-item -->
<li>Limited effectiveness against hardened, shielded UAVs</li>
<!-- /wp:list-item -->

<!-- wp:list-item -->
<li>Requires a direct line of sight to target for maximum efficiency</li>
<!-- /wp:list-item --></ul>
<!-- /wp:list --></li>
<!-- /wp:list-item -->

<!-- wp:list-item -->
<li><strong>Operational Constraints:</strong><!-- wp:list -->
<ul class="wp-block-list"><!-- wp:list-item -->
<li>Requires a stable power supply for continuous operation</li>
<!-- /wp:list-item -->

<!-- wp:list-item -->
<li>Potential interference with friendly electronics in close proximity</li>
<!-- /wp:list-item --></ul>
<!-- /wp:list --></li>
<!-- /wp:list-item -->

<!-- wp:list-item -->
<li><strong>Adversary Countermeasures:</strong><!-- wp:list -->
<ul class="wp-block-list"><!-- wp:list-item -->
<li>Future drone designs may incorporate electromagnetic shielding</li>
<!-- /wp:list-item -->

<!-- wp:list-item -->
<li>Some UAVs may be programmed for evasive maneuvers when exposed to HPM</li>
<!-- /wp:list-item --></ul>
<!-- /wp:list --></li>
<!-- /wp:list-item --></ul>
<!-- /wp:list -->

<!-- wp:heading {"className":""} -->
<h2 class="wp-block-heading"><strong>Future Developments &amp; Upgrades</strong></h2>
<!-- /wp:heading -->

<!-- wp:list -->
<ul class="wp-block-list"><!-- wp:list-item -->
<li><strong>Planned Enhancements:</strong><!-- wp:list -->
<ul class="wp-block-list"><!-- wp:list-item -->
<li>Ongoing software upgrades for waveform adaptability</li>
<!-- /wp:list-item -->

<!-- wp:list-item -->
<li>Research into airborne and ship-based variants</li>
<!-- /wp:list-item --></ul>
<!-- /wp:list --></li>
<!-- /wp:list-item -->

<!-- wp:list-item -->
<li><strong>Integration with Other Systems:</strong><!-- wp:list -->
<ul class="wp-block-list"><!-- wp:list-item -->
<li>Being tested for integration with U.S. military's layered air defense networks</li>
<!-- /wp:list-item --></ul>
<!-- /wp:list --></li>
<!-- /wp:list-item -->

<!-- wp:list-item -->
<li><strong>Future Deployment Plans:</strong><!-- wp:list -->
<ul class="wp-block-list"><!-- wp:list-item -->
<li>Expected to be fielded in military and critical infrastructure protection roles in the coming years</li>
<!-- /wp:list-item --></ul>
<!-- /wp:list --></li>
<!-- /wp:list-item --></ul>
<!-- /wp:list -->

<!-- wp:paragraph -->
<p></p>
<!-- /wp:paragraph -->

<!-- wp:paragraph -->
<p>Image: Epirus</p>
<!-- /wp:paragraph -->

<!-- wp:paragraph -->
<p></p>
<!-- /wp:paragraph -->

<!-- wp:paragraph -->

<!-- /wp:paragraph -->

## DroneDefender Counter-Drone System (US)

**Date:** Sun, 30 Mar 2025 23:08:43 +0000  
**Author:** norskluftvern  
**Type:** Post  
**Link:** [http://norskluftvern.com/2025/03/31/dronedefender-counter-drone-system-us/](http://norskluftvern.com/2025/03/31/dronedefender-counter-drone-system-us/)

<!-- wp:paragraph -->
<p>DroneDefender, a portable counter-drone system developed by Dedrone.&nbsp;Utilizing radio-frequency (RF) jamming, DroneDefender provides a non-kinetic method for neutralizing unmanned aerial threats, primarily commercial drones.</p>
<!-- /wp:paragraph -->

<!-- wp:heading {"className":""} -->
<h2 class="wp-block-heading"><strong>System Overview</strong></h2>
<!-- /wp:heading -->

<!-- wp:list -->
<ul class="wp-block-list"><!-- wp:list-item -->
<li><strong>Name:</strong>&nbsp;DroneDefender</li>
<!-- /wp:list-item -->

<!-- wp:list-item -->
<li><strong>Manufacturer:</strong>&nbsp;Dedrone</li>
<!-- /wp:list-item -->

<!-- wp:list-item -->
<li><strong>Country of Origin:</strong>&nbsp;United States</li>
<!-- /wp:list-item -->

<!-- wp:list-item -->
<li><strong>Type:</strong>&nbsp;RF jammer (electronic countermeasure)</li>
<!-- /wp:list-item -->

<!-- wp:list-item -->
<li><strong>Intended Use:</strong>&nbsp;Law enforcement, military, and critical infrastructure protection</li>
<!-- /wp:list-item --></ul>
<!-- /wp:list -->

<!-- wp:heading {"className":""} -->
<h2 class="wp-block-heading"><strong>Technical Specifications</strong></h2>
<!-- /wp:heading -->

<!-- wp:list -->
<ul class="wp-block-list"><!-- wp:list-item -->
<li><strong>Detection Capabilities:</strong><!-- wp:list -->
<ul class="wp-block-list"><!-- wp:list-item -->
<li>Integrated with Dedrone’s AI-driven detection and tracking software</li>
<!-- /wp:list-item -->

<!-- wp:list-item -->
<li>Can be used with radar, radio-frequency sensors, and electro-optical systems</li>
<!-- /wp:list-item --></ul>
<!-- /wp:list --></li>
<!-- /wp:list-item -->

<!-- wp:list-item -->
<li><strong>Neutralization Method:</strong><!-- wp:list -->
<ul class="wp-block-list"><!-- wp:list-item -->
<li>Radio-frequency (RF) jamming disrupts drone communication and GPS signals</li>
<!-- /wp:list-item -->

<!-- wp:list-item -->
<li>Forces drones to land or return to their point of origin</li>
<!-- /wp:list-item --></ul>
<!-- /wp:list --></li>
<!-- /wp:list-item -->

<!-- wp:list-item -->
<li><strong>Effective Range:</strong><!-- wp:list -->
<ul class="wp-block-list"><!-- wp:list-item -->
<li>Up to 2 km, depending on environmental conditions and drone type</li>
<!-- /wp:list-item --></ul>
<!-- /wp:list --></li>
<!-- /wp:list-item -->

<!-- wp:list-item -->
<li><strong>Mobility:</strong><!-- wp:list -->
<ul class="wp-block-list"><!-- wp:list-item -->
<li>Man-portable (rifle-like design)</li>
<!-- /wp:list-item --></ul>
<!-- /wp:list --></li>
<!-- /wp:list-item -->

<!-- wp:list-item -->
<li><strong>Deployment Mode:</strong><!-- wp:list -->
<ul class="wp-block-list"><!-- wp:list-item -->
<li>Handheld, battery-powered system</li>
<!-- /wp:list-item --></ul>
<!-- /wp:list --></li>
<!-- /wp:list-item --></ul>
<!-- /wp:list -->

<!-- wp:heading {"className":""} -->
<h2 class="wp-block-heading"><strong>Operational Use &amp; Effectiveness</strong></h2>
<!-- /wp:heading -->

<!-- wp:list -->
<ul class="wp-block-list"><!-- wp:list-item -->
<li><strong>Known Deployments:</strong><!-- wp:list -->
<ul class="wp-block-list"><!-- wp:list-item -->
<li>Used by U.S. and allied military forces, law enforcement, and government agencies</li>
<!-- /wp:list-item -->

<!-- wp:list-item -->
<li>Deployed at high-security events, including U.S. presidential inaugurations</li>
<!-- /wp:list-item --></ul>
<!-- /wp:list --></li>
<!-- /wp:list-item -->

<!-- wp:list-item -->
<li><strong>Combat/Field Testing History:</strong><!-- wp:list -->
<ul class="wp-block-list"><!-- wp:list-item -->
<li>Successfully tested against commercial drones in real-world conditions</li>
<!-- /wp:list-item -->

<!-- wp:list-item -->
<li>Used in counter-terrorism and border security operations</li>
<!-- /wp:list-item --></ul>
<!-- /wp:list --></li>
<!-- /wp:list-item -->

<!-- wp:list-item -->
<li><strong>Effectiveness Against Various Drone Types:</strong><!-- wp:list -->
<ul class="wp-block-list"><!-- wp:list-item -->
<li>Effective against most commercial and consumer drones</li>
<!-- /wp:list-item -->

<!-- wp:list-item -->
<li>Limited effectiveness against military-grade UAVs with encrypted communication</li>
<!-- /wp:list-item --></ul>
<!-- /wp:list --></li>
<!-- /wp:list-item --></ul>
<!-- /wp:list -->

<!-- wp:heading {"className":""} -->
<h2 class="wp-block-heading"><strong>Notable Features &amp; Advantages</strong></h2>
<!-- /wp:heading -->

<!-- wp:list -->
<ul class="wp-block-list"><!-- wp:list-item -->
<li><strong>Key Strengths:</strong><!-- wp:list -->
<ul class="wp-block-list"><!-- wp:list-item -->
<li>Non-destructive method for disabling drones</li>
<!-- /wp:list-item -->

<!-- wp:list-item -->
<li>Silent operation without visible or audible detection</li>
<!-- /wp:list-item --></ul>
<!-- /wp:list --></li>
<!-- /wp:list-item -->

<!-- wp:list-item -->
<li><strong>Unique Capabilities:</strong><!-- wp:list -->
<ul class="wp-block-list"><!-- wp:list-item -->
<li>Disrupts multiple communication bands simultaneously (GPS, Wi-Fi, etc.)</li>
<!-- /wp:list-item -->

<!-- wp:list-item -->
<li>Compact and easy to deploy in urban and field environments</li>
<!-- /wp:list-item --></ul>
<!-- /wp:list --></li>
<!-- /wp:list-item -->

<!-- wp:list-item -->
<li><strong>Adaptability &amp; Scalability:</strong><!-- wp:list -->
<ul class="wp-block-list"><!-- wp:list-item -->
<li>Can be used as part of a larger counter-drone system with multiple sensors</li>
<!-- /wp:list-item --></ul>
<!-- /wp:list --></li>
<!-- /wp:list-item --></ul>
<!-- /wp:list -->

<!-- wp:heading {"className":""} -->
<h2 class="wp-block-heading"><strong>Limitations &amp; Challenges</strong></h2>
<!-- /wp:heading -->

<!-- wp:list -->
<ul class="wp-block-list"><!-- wp:list-item -->
<li><strong>Known Weaknesses:</strong><!-- wp:list -->
<ul class="wp-block-list"><!-- wp:list-item -->
<li>Not effective against drones with pre-programmed flight paths</li>
<!-- /wp:list-item -->

<!-- wp:list-item -->
<li>Limited range compared to kinetic or directed energy solutions</li>
<!-- /wp:list-item --></ul>
<!-- /wp:list --></li>
<!-- /wp:list-item -->

<!-- wp:list-item -->
<li><strong>Operational Constraints:</strong><!-- wp:list -->
<ul class="wp-block-list"><!-- wp:list-item -->
<li>Requires trained operators for effective use</li>
<!-- /wp:list-item -->

<!-- wp:list-item -->
<li>Battery life limits operational duration</li>
<!-- /wp:list-item --></ul>
<!-- /wp:list --></li>
<!-- /wp:list-item -->

<!-- wp:list-item -->
<li><strong>Adversary Countermeasures:</strong><!-- wp:list -->
<ul class="wp-block-list"><!-- wp:list-item -->
<li>Advanced drones may use frequency-hopping or encrypted communication to resist jamming</li>
<!-- /wp:list-item -->

<!-- wp:list-item -->
<li>Some UAVs may switch to autonomous operation if jamming is detected</li>
<!-- /wp:list-item --></ul>
<!-- /wp:list --></li>
<!-- /wp:list-item --></ul>
<!-- /wp:list -->

<!-- wp:heading {"className":""} -->
<h2 class="wp-block-heading"><strong>Future Developments &amp; Upgrades</strong></h2>
<!-- /wp:heading -->

<!-- wp:list -->
<ul class="wp-block-list"><!-- wp:list-item -->
<li><strong>Planned Enhancements:</strong><!-- wp:list -->
<ul class="wp-block-list"><!-- wp:list-item -->
<li>Research into increased range and frequency coverage</li>
<!-- /wp:list-item -->

<!-- wp:list-item -->
<li>AI-driven adaptive jamming for enhanced effectiveness</li>
<!-- /wp:list-item --></ul>
<!-- /wp:list --></li>
<!-- /wp:list-item -->

<!-- wp:list-item -->
<li><strong>Integration with Other Systems:</strong><!-- wp:list -->
<ul class="wp-block-list"><!-- wp:list-item -->
<li>Compatible with Dedrone’s full counter-drone ecosystem</li>
<!-- /wp:list-item --></ul>
<!-- /wp:list --></li>
<!-- /wp:list-item -->

<!-- wp:list-item -->
<li><strong>Future Deployment Plans:</strong><!-- wp:list -->
<ul class="wp-block-list"><!-- wp:list-item -->
<li>Expected to see continued expansion in military, law enforcement, and VIP protection roles</li>
<!-- /wp:list-item --></ul>
<!-- /wp:list --></li>
<!-- /wp:list-item --></ul>
<!-- /wp:list -->

<!-- wp:paragraph -->
<p></p>
<!-- /wp:paragraph -->

<!-- wp:paragraph -->
<p>Image: U.S. Army photo by 55th Signal Company</p>
<!-- /wp:paragraph -->

<!-- wp:paragraph -->
<p></p>
<!-- /wp:paragraph -->

<!-- /wp:paragraph -->

## Stryker M-SHORAD Counter-Drone System (US)

**Date:** Sun, 30 Mar 2025 23:09:12 +0000  
**Author:** norskluftvern  
**Type:** Post  
**Link:** [http://norskluftvern.com/2025/03/31/stryker-m-shorad-counter-drone-system-us/](http://norskluftvern.com/2025/03/31/stryker-m-shorad-counter-drone-system-us/)

<!-- wp:paragraph -->
<p>The Stryker M-SHORAD (Maneuver-Short Range Air Defense) system, a mobile and multi-layered air defense platform developed by a consortium including Leonardo DRS, General Dynamics Land Systems, and Raytheon Technologies.&nbsp;Designed to counter a range of aerial threats, including drones, helicopters, and fixed-wing aircraft, the Stryker M-SHORAD integrates kinetic and electronic warfare capabilities.</p>
<!-- /wp:paragraph -->

<!-- wp:separator -->
<hr class="wp-block-separator has-alpha-channel-opacity" />
<!-- /wp:separator -->

<!-- wp:heading {"className":""} -->
<h2 class="wp-block-heading"><strong>System Overview</strong></h2>
<!-- /wp:heading -->

<!-- wp:list -->
<ul class="wp-block-list"><!-- wp:list-item -->
<li><strong>Name:</strong>&nbsp;Stryker M-SHORAD (Maneuver-Short Range Air Defense)</li>
<!-- /wp:list-item -->

<!-- wp:list-item -->
<li><strong>Manufacturer:</strong>&nbsp;Leonardo DRS, General Dynamics Land Systems, Raytheon Technologies</li>
<!-- /wp:list-item -->

<!-- wp:list-item -->
<li><strong>Country of Origin:</strong>&nbsp;United States</li>
<!-- /wp:list-item -->

<!-- wp:list-item -->
<li><strong>Type:</strong>&nbsp;Mobile, multi-layered air defense system (kinetic and electronic warfare)</li>
<!-- /wp:list-item -->

<!-- wp:list-item -->
<li><strong>Intended Use:</strong>&nbsp;Military air defense against drones, helicopters, fixed-wing aircraft, and missiles</li>
<!-- /wp:list-item --></ul>
<!-- /wp:list -->

<!-- wp:separator -->
<hr class="wp-block-separator has-alpha-channel-opacity" />
<!-- /wp:separator -->

<!-- wp:heading {"className":""} -->
<h2 class="wp-block-heading"><strong>Technical Specifications</strong></h2>
<!-- /wp:heading -->

<!-- wp:list -->
<ul class="wp-block-list"><!-- wp:list-item -->
<li><strong>Detection Capabilities:</strong><!-- wp:list -->
<ul class="wp-block-list"><!-- wp:list-item -->
<li>AN/APG-74 Active Electronically Scanned Array (AESA) radar</li>
<!-- /wp:list-item -->

<!-- wp:list-item -->
<li>Electro-optical/infrared (EO/IR) tracking sensors</li>
<!-- /wp:list-item -->

<!-- wp:list-item -->
<li>Integrated with U.S. Army battlefield networks</li>
<!-- /wp:list-item --></ul>
<!-- /wp:list --></li>
<!-- /wp:list-item -->

<!-- wp:list-item -->
<li><strong>Neutralization Method:</strong><!-- wp:list -->
<ul class="wp-block-list"><!-- wp:list-item -->
<li><strong>Kinetic:</strong><!-- wp:list -->
<ul class="wp-block-list"><!-- wp:list-item -->
<li>M230 30mm chain gun with programmable airburst ammunition</li>
<!-- /wp:list-item -->

<!-- wp:list-item -->
<li>Stinger (FIM-92) and Hellfire (AGM-114) missiles</li>
<!-- /wp:list-item --></ul>
<!-- /wp:list --></li>
<!-- /wp:list-item -->

<!-- wp:list-item -->
<li><strong>Electronic Warfare:</strong><!-- wp:list -->
<ul class="wp-block-list"><!-- wp:list-item -->
<li>Mounted electronic attack system for drone disruption</li>
<!-- /wp:list-item --></ul>
<!-- /wp:list --></li>
<!-- /wp:list-item --></ul>
<!-- /wp:list --></li>
<!-- /wp:list-item -->

<!-- wp:list-item -->
<li><strong>Effective Range:</strong><!-- wp:list -->
<ul class="wp-block-list"><!-- wp:list-item -->
<li><strong>Missiles:</strong>&nbsp;Up to 8 km (Stinger), 8+ km (Hellfire)</li>
<!-- /wp:list-item -->

<!-- wp:list-item -->
<li><strong>30mm Airburst Rounds:</strong>&nbsp;Effective against small UAVs at 3–4 km</li>
<!-- /wp:list-item -->

<!-- wp:list-item -->
<li><strong>Electronic Attack:</strong>&nbsp;Classified but used for soft-kill capabilities</li>
<!-- /wp:list-item --></ul>
<!-- /wp:list --></li>
<!-- /wp:list-item -->

<!-- wp:list-item -->
<li><strong>Mobility:</strong><!-- wp:list -->
<ul class="wp-block-list"><!-- wp:list-item -->
<li>Based on Stryker armored fighting vehicle (8x8)</li>
<!-- /wp:list-item --></ul>
<!-- /wp:list --></li>
<!-- /wp:list-item -->

<!-- wp:list-item -->
<li><strong>Deployment Mode:</strong><!-- wp:list -->
<ul class="wp-block-list"><!-- wp:list-item -->
<li>Vehicle-mounted, designed for rapid deployment with maneuvering ground forces</li>
<!-- /wp:list-item --></ul>
<!-- /wp:list --></li>
<!-- /wp:list-item --></ul>
<!-- /wp:list -->

<!-- wp:separator -->
<hr class="wp-block-separator has-alpha-channel-opacity" />
<!-- /wp:separator -->

<!-- wp:heading {"className":""} -->
<h2 class="wp-block-heading"><strong>Operational Use &amp; Effectiveness</strong></h2>
<!-- /wp:heading -->

<!-- wp:list -->
<ul class="wp-block-list"><!-- wp:list-item -->
<li><strong>Known Deployments:</strong><!-- wp:list -->
<ul class="wp-block-list"><!-- wp:list-item -->
<li>U.S. Army (European Command and Indo-Pacific Command)</li>
<!-- /wp:list-item -->

<!-- wp:list-item -->
<li>Initial units deployed in 2021 to counter growing UAV threats</li>
<!-- /wp:list-item --></ul>
<!-- /wp:list --></li>
<!-- /wp:list-item -->

<!-- wp:list-item -->
<li><strong>Combat/Field Testing History:</strong><!-- wp:list -->
<ul class="wp-block-list"><!-- wp:list-item -->
<li>Extensively tested in military exercises with NATO allies</li>
<!-- /wp:list-item -->

<!-- wp:list-item -->
<li>Proven ability to engage multiple air threats, including drones</li>
<!-- /wp:list-item --></ul>
<!-- /wp:list --></li>
<!-- /wp:list-item -->

<!-- wp:list-item -->
<li><strong>Effectiveness Against Various Drone Types:</strong><!-- wp:list -->
<ul class="wp-block-list"><!-- wp:list-item -->
<li>Can neutralize&nbsp;<strong>Group 1 to Group 3 drones</strong>&nbsp;(small, medium, and larger tactical UAVs)</li>
<!-- /wp:list-item -->

<!-- wp:list-item -->
<li><strong>Soft-kill electronic attack</strong>&nbsp;provides non-destructive countermeasures</li>
<!-- /wp:list-item --></ul>
<!-- /wp:list --></li>
<!-- /wp:list-item --></ul>
<!-- /wp:list -->

<!-- wp:separator -->
<hr class="wp-block-separator has-alpha-channel-opacity" />
<!-- /wp:separator -->

<!-- wp:heading {"className":""} -->
<h2 class="wp-block-heading"><strong>Notable Features &amp; Advantages</strong></h2>
<!-- /wp:heading -->

<!-- wp:list -->
<ul class="wp-block-list"><!-- wp:list-item -->
<li><strong>Key Strengths:</strong><!-- wp:list -->
<ul class="wp-block-list"><!-- wp:list-item -->
<li>Multi-layered air defense combining&nbsp;<strong>kinetic and electronic</strong>&nbsp;counter-drone capabilities</li>
<!-- /wp:list-item -->

<!-- wp:list-item -->
<li>Fully mobile, providing&nbsp;<strong>on-the-move protection for ground forces</strong></li>
<!-- /wp:list-item --></ul>
<!-- /wp:list --></li>
<!-- /wp:list-item -->

<!-- wp:list-item -->
<li><strong>Unique Capabilities:</strong><!-- wp:list -->
<ul class="wp-block-list"><!-- wp:list-item -->
<li>AESA radar enables&nbsp;<strong>early drone detection</strong></li>
<!-- /wp:list-item -->

<!-- wp:list-item -->
<li><strong>Combines short-range air defense (SHORAD) with anti-drone warfare</strong></li>
<!-- /wp:list-item --></ul>
<!-- /wp:list --></li>
<!-- /wp:list-item -->

<!-- wp:list-item -->
<li><strong>Adaptability &amp; Scalability:</strong><!-- wp:list -->
<ul class="wp-block-list"><!-- wp:list-item -->
<li>Designed to&nbsp;<strong>integrate with future directed energy weapons</strong></li>
<!-- /wp:list-item --></ul>
<!-- /wp:list --></li>
<!-- /wp:list-item --></ul>
<!-- /wp:list -->

<!-- wp:separator -->
<hr class="wp-block-separator has-alpha-channel-opacity" />
<!-- /wp:separator -->

<!-- wp:heading {"className":""} -->
<h2 class="wp-block-heading"><strong>Limitations &amp; Challenges</strong></h2>
<!-- /wp:heading -->

<!-- wp:list -->
<ul class="wp-block-list"><!-- wp:list-item -->
<li><strong>Known Weaknesses:</strong><!-- wp:list -->
<ul class="wp-block-list"><!-- wp:list-item -->
<li><strong>Limited missile capacity</strong>&nbsp;(only 4 Hellfire and 4 Stinger missiles per vehicle)</li>
<!-- /wp:list-item -->

<!-- wp:list-item -->
<li>30mm cannon&nbsp;<strong>less effective against swarm drone attacks</strong></li>
<!-- /wp:list-item --></ul>
<!-- /wp:list --></li>
<!-- /wp:list-item -->

<!-- wp:list-item -->
<li><strong>Operational Constraints:</strong><!-- wp:list -->
<ul class="wp-block-list"><!-- wp:list-item -->
<li>Heavier and slower than smaller counter-drone platforms</li>
<!-- /wp:list-item -->

<!-- wp:list-item -->
<li>Requires networked battlefield integration for maximum effectiveness</li>
<!-- /wp:list-item --></ul>
<!-- /wp:list --></li>
<!-- /wp:list-item -->

<!-- wp:list-item -->
<li><strong>Adversary Countermeasures:</strong><!-- wp:list -->
<ul class="wp-block-list"><!-- wp:list-item -->
<li>Large drone swarms could overwhelm its kinetic defenses</li>
<!-- /wp:list-item -->

<!-- wp:list-item -->
<li>Some UAVs may use electronic counter-countermeasures (ECCM) to bypass jamming</li>
<!-- /wp:list-item --></ul>
<!-- /wp:list --></li>
<!-- /wp:list-item --></ul>
<!-- /wp:list -->

<!-- wp:separator -->
<hr class="wp-block-separator has-alpha-channel-opacity" />
<!-- /wp:separator -->

<!-- wp:heading {"className":""} -->
<h2 class="wp-block-heading"><strong>Future Developments &amp; Upgrades</strong></h2>
<!-- /wp:heading -->

<!-- wp:list -->
<ul class="wp-block-list"><!-- wp:list-item -->
<li><strong>Planned Enhancements:</strong><!-- wp:list -->
<ul class="wp-block-list"><!-- wp:list-item -->
<li><strong>Integration of 50kW laser weapons</strong>&nbsp;in future Stryker M-SHORAD variants</li>
<!-- /wp:list-item -->

<!-- wp:list-item -->
<li><strong>Expanded electronic warfare capabilities</strong>&nbsp;for enhanced drone disruption</li>
<!-- /wp:list-item --></ul>
<!-- /wp:list --></li>
<!-- /wp:list-item -->

<!-- wp:list-item -->
<li><strong>Integration with Other Systems:</strong><!-- wp:list -->
<ul class="wp-block-list"><!-- wp:list-item -->
<li><strong>Interoperable with Patriot and other U.S. air defense networks</strong></li>
<!-- /wp:list-item --></ul>
<!-- /wp:list --></li>
<!-- /wp:list-item -->

<!-- wp:list-item -->
<li><strong>Future Deployment Plans:</strong><!-- wp:list -->
<ul class="wp-block-list"><!-- wp:list-item -->
<li>Additional Stryker M-SHORAD units expected in&nbsp;<strong>Europe and the Pacific theater</strong></li>
<!-- /wp:list-item --></ul>
<!-- /wp:list --></li>
<!-- /wp:list-item --></ul>
<!-- /wp:list -->

## SkyWall 100 &amp; SkyWall 300 Counter-Drone System (UK)

**Date:** Sun, 30 Mar 2025 23:11:06 +0000  
**Author:** norskluftvern  
**Type:** Post  
**Link:** [http://norskluftvern.com/2025/03/31/skywall-100-skywall-300-counter-drone-system-uk/](http://norskluftvern.com/2025/03/31/skywall-100-skywall-300-counter-drone-system-uk/)

<!-- wp:paragraph -->
<p>The SkyWall 100 and SkyWall 300, a unique counter-drone system developed by OpenWorks Engineering.&nbsp;Utilizing net-based capture technology, these systems offer a non-destructive method for intercepting unmanned aerial vehicles.</p>
<!-- /wp:paragraph -->

<!-- wp:separator -->
<hr class="wp-block-separator has-alpha-channel-opacity" />
<!-- /wp:separator -->

<!-- wp:heading {"className":""} -->
<h2 class="wp-block-heading"><strong>System Overview</strong></h2>
<!-- /wp:heading -->

<!-- wp:list -->
<ul class="wp-block-list"><!-- wp:list-item -->
<li><strong>Name:</strong>&nbsp;SkyWall 100 &amp; SkyWall 300</li>
<!-- /wp:list-item -->

<!-- wp:list-item -->
<li><strong>Manufacturer:</strong>&nbsp;OpenWorks Engineering</li>
<!-- /wp:list-item -->

<!-- wp:list-item -->
<li><strong>Country of Origin:</strong>&nbsp;United Kingdom</li>
<!-- /wp:list-item -->

<!-- wp:list-item -->
<li><strong>Type:</strong>&nbsp;Physical capture system (net-based interception)</li>
<!-- /wp:list-item -->

<!-- wp:list-item -->
<li><strong>Intended Use:</strong>&nbsp;Law enforcement, military, and critical infrastructure protection</li>
<!-- /wp:list-item --></ul>
<!-- /wp:list -->

<!-- wp:separator -->
<hr class="wp-block-separator has-alpha-channel-opacity" />
<!-- /wp:separator -->

<!-- wp:heading {"className":""} -->
<h2 class="wp-block-heading"><strong>Technical Specifications</strong></h2>
<!-- /wp:heading -->

<!-- wp:heading {"level":3,"className":""} -->
<h3 class="wp-block-heading"><strong>SkyWall 100 (Man-Portable System)</strong></h3>
<!-- /wp:heading -->

<!-- wp:list -->
<ul class="wp-block-list"><!-- wp:list-item -->
<li><strong>Detection Capabilities:</strong><!-- wp:list -->
<ul class="wp-block-list"><!-- wp:list-item -->
<li>Operator-guided targeting with smart scope</li>
<!-- /wp:list-item -->

<!-- wp:list-item -->
<li>Can be integrated with external radar and sensor networks</li>
<!-- /wp:list-item --></ul>
<!-- /wp:list --></li>
<!-- /wp:list-item -->

<!-- wp:list-item -->
<li><strong>Neutralization Method:</strong><!-- wp:list -->
<ul class="wp-block-list"><!-- wp:list-item -->
<li>Pneumatically launched net entanglement system</li>
<!-- /wp:list-item -->

<!-- wp:list-item -->
<li>Optional parachute deployment to prevent drone damage</li>
<!-- /wp:list-item --></ul>
<!-- /wp:list --></li>
<!-- /wp:list-item -->

<!-- wp:list-item -->
<li><strong>Effective Range:</strong><!-- wp:list -->
<ul class="wp-block-list"><!-- wp:list-item -->
<li>Up to 100 meters</li>
<!-- /wp:list-item --></ul>
<!-- /wp:list --></li>
<!-- /wp:list-item -->

<!-- wp:list-item -->
<li><strong>Mobility:</strong><!-- wp:list -->
<ul class="wp-block-list"><!-- wp:list-item -->
<li>Man-portable, shoulder-fired system</li>
<!-- /wp:list-item --></ul>
<!-- /wp:list --></li>
<!-- /wp:list-item -->

<!-- wp:list-item -->
<li><strong>Deployment Mode:</strong><!-- wp:list -->
<ul class="wp-block-list"><!-- wp:list-item -->
<li>Handheld, standalone operation</li>
<!-- /wp:list-item --></ul>
<!-- /wp:list --></li>
<!-- /wp:list-item --></ul>
<!-- /wp:list -->

<!-- wp:heading {"level":3,"className":""} -->
<h3 class="wp-block-heading"><strong>SkyWall 300 (Automated System)</strong></h3>
<!-- /wp:heading -->

<!-- wp:list -->
<ul class="wp-block-list"><!-- wp:list-item -->
<li><strong>Detection Capabilities:</strong><!-- wp:list -->
<ul class="wp-block-list"><!-- wp:list-item -->
<li>Fully automated targeting using radar and electro-optical tracking</li>
<!-- /wp:list-item --></ul>
<!-- /wp:list --></li>
<!-- /wp:list-item -->

<!-- wp:list-item -->
<li><strong>Neutralization Method:</strong><!-- wp:list -->
<ul class="wp-block-list"><!-- wp:list-item -->
<li>Robotic turret fires net-based interception rounds</li>
<!-- /wp:list-item -->

<!-- wp:list-item -->
<li>Can be integrated with larger C-UAS networks</li>
<!-- /wp:list-item --></ul>
<!-- /wp:list --></li>
<!-- /wp:list-item -->

<!-- wp:list-item -->
<li><strong>Effective Range:</strong><!-- wp:list -->
<ul class="wp-block-list"><!-- wp:list-item -->
<li>Up to 250 meters</li>
<!-- /wp:list-item --></ul>
<!-- /wp:list --></li>
<!-- /wp:list-item -->

<!-- wp:list-item -->
<li><strong>Mobility:</strong><!-- wp:list -->
<ul class="wp-block-list"><!-- wp:list-item -->
<li>Fixed or vehicle-mounted turret</li>
<!-- /wp:list-item --></ul>
<!-- /wp:list --></li>
<!-- /wp:list-item -->

<!-- wp:list-item -->
<li><strong>Deployment Mode:</strong><!-- wp:list -->
<ul class="wp-block-list"><!-- wp:list-item -->
<li>Automated, networked operation</li>
<!-- /wp:list-item --></ul>
<!-- /wp:list --></li>
<!-- /wp:list-item --></ul>
<!-- /wp:list -->

<!-- wp:separator -->
<hr class="wp-block-separator has-alpha-channel-opacity" />
<!-- /wp:separator -->

<!-- wp:heading {"className":""} -->
<h2 class="wp-block-heading"><strong>Operational Use &amp; Effectiveness</strong></h2>
<!-- /wp:heading -->

<!-- wp:list -->
<ul class="wp-block-list"><!-- wp:list-item -->
<li><strong>Known Deployments:</strong><!-- wp:list -->
<ul class="wp-block-list"><!-- wp:list-item -->
<li>Used by UK security forces and other European agencies</li>
<!-- /wp:list-item -->

<!-- wp:list-item -->
<li>Deployed at high-security events such as&nbsp;<strong>G7 Summits and Olympic Games</strong></li>
<!-- /wp:list-item --></ul>
<!-- /wp:list --></li>
<!-- /wp:list-item -->

<!-- wp:list-item -->
<li><strong>Combat/Field Testing History:</strong><!-- wp:list -->
<ul class="wp-block-list"><!-- wp:list-item -->
<li>Successfully demonstrated at multiple military and law enforcement trials</li>
<!-- /wp:list-item -->

<!-- wp:list-item -->
<li>Proven effective against small commercial UAVs in controlled and real-world environments</li>
<!-- /wp:list-item --></ul>
<!-- /wp:list --></li>
<!-- /wp:list-item -->

<!-- wp:list-item -->
<li><strong>Effectiveness Against Various Drone Types:</strong><!-- wp:list -->
<ul class="wp-block-list"><!-- wp:list-item -->
<li>Highly effective against&nbsp;<strong>small drones (Group 1 UAVs)</strong></li>
<!-- /wp:list-item -->

<!-- wp:list-item -->
<li><strong>Less effective against swarms or larger, high-speed UAVs</strong></li>
<!-- /wp:list-item --></ul>
<!-- /wp:list --></li>
<!-- /wp:list-item --></ul>
<!-- /wp:list -->

<!-- wp:separator -->
<hr class="wp-block-separator has-alpha-channel-opacity" />
<!-- /wp:separator -->

<!-- wp:heading {"className":""} -->
<h2 class="wp-block-heading"><strong>Notable Features &amp; Advantages</strong></h2>
<!-- /wp:heading -->

<!-- wp:list -->
<ul class="wp-block-list"><!-- wp:list-item -->
<li><strong>Key Strengths:</strong><!-- wp:list -->
<ul class="wp-block-list"><!-- wp:list-item -->
<li><strong>Non-destructive capture method</strong>&nbsp;(allows forensic analysis of drones)</li>
<!-- /wp:list-item -->

<!-- wp:list-item -->
<li><strong>No RF interference</strong>, making it suitable for urban and sensitive environments</li>
<!-- /wp:list-item --></ul>
<!-- /wp:list --></li>
<!-- /wp:list-item -->

<!-- wp:list-item -->
<li><strong>Unique Capabilities:</strong><!-- wp:list -->
<ul class="wp-block-list"><!-- wp:list-item -->
<li>SkyWall 100:&nbsp;<strong>Handheld deployment for rapid response</strong></li>
<!-- /wp:list-item -->

<!-- wp:list-item -->
<li>SkyWall 300:&nbsp;<strong>Automated tracking and engagement</strong>&nbsp;for fixed-site security</li>
<!-- /wp:list-item --></ul>
<!-- /wp:list --></li>
<!-- /wp:list-item -->

<!-- wp:list-item -->
<li><strong>Adaptability &amp; Scalability:</strong><!-- wp:list -->
<ul class="wp-block-list"><!-- wp:list-item -->
<li>Can be&nbsp;<strong>integrated with radar and jamming solutions</strong>&nbsp;for layered C-UAS defense</li>
<!-- /wp:list-item --></ul>
<!-- /wp:list --></li>
<!-- /wp:list-item --></ul>
<!-- /wp:list -->

<!-- wp:separator -->
<hr class="wp-block-separator has-alpha-channel-opacity" />
<!-- /wp:separator -->

<!-- wp:heading {"className":""} -->
<h2 class="wp-block-heading"><strong>Limitations &amp; Challenges</strong></h2>
<!-- /wp:heading -->

<!-- wp:list -->
<ul class="wp-block-list"><!-- wp:list-item -->
<li><strong>Known Weaknesses:</strong><!-- wp:list -->
<ul class="wp-block-list"><!-- wp:list-item -->
<li><strong>Limited range compared to electronic warfare or kinetic solutions</strong></li>
<!-- /wp:list-item -->

<!-- wp:list-item -->
<li><strong>Less effective against large UAVs or high-speed drones</strong></li>
<!-- /wp:list-item --></ul>
<!-- /wp:list --></li>
<!-- /wp:list-item -->

<!-- wp:list-item -->
<li><strong>Operational Constraints:</strong><!-- wp:list -->
<ul class="wp-block-list"><!-- wp:list-item -->
<li>SkyWall 100:&nbsp;<strong>Requires manual aiming and reloading</strong></li>
<!-- /wp:list-item -->

<!-- wp:list-item -->
<li>SkyWall 300:&nbsp;<strong>Fixed deployment limits mobility</strong></li>
<!-- /wp:list-item --></ul>
<!-- /wp:list --></li>
<!-- /wp:list-item -->

<!-- wp:list-item -->
<li><strong>Adversary Countermeasures:</strong><!-- wp:list -->
<ul class="wp-block-list"><!-- wp:list-item -->
<li>Drones with&nbsp;<strong>high agility or countermeasures</strong>&nbsp;may evade net capture</li>
<!-- /wp:list-item -->

<!-- wp:list-item -->
<li><strong>Autonomous drones</strong>&nbsp;may continue operation after net entanglement</li>
<!-- /wp:list-item --></ul>
<!-- /wp:list --></li>
<!-- /wp:list-item --></ul>
<!-- /wp:list -->

<!-- wp:separator -->
<hr class="wp-block-separator has-alpha-channel-opacity" />
<!-- /wp:separator -->

<!-- wp:heading {"className":""} -->
<h2 class="wp-block-heading"><strong>Future Developments &amp; Upgrades</strong></h2>
<!-- /wp:heading -->

<!-- wp:list -->
<ul class="wp-block-list"><!-- wp:list-item -->
<li><strong>Planned Enhancements:</strong><!-- wp:list -->
<ul class="wp-block-list"><!-- wp:list-item -->
<li><strong>Improved automation and AI integration</strong>&nbsp;for SkyWall 300</li>
<!-- /wp:list-item -->

<!-- wp:list-item -->
<li><strong>Enhanced net technology</strong>&nbsp;to capture larger drone models</li>
<!-- /wp:list-item --></ul>
<!-- /wp:list --></li>
<!-- /wp:list-item -->

<!-- wp:list-item -->
<li><strong>Integration with Other Systems:</strong><!-- wp:list -->
<ul class="wp-block-list"><!-- wp:list-item -->

<!-- /wp:list-item --></ul>

## Drone Dome Counter-Drone System (Israel)

**Date:** Sun, 30 Mar 2025 23:11:35 +0000  
**Author:** norskluftvern  
**Type:** Post  
**Link:** [http://norskluftvern.com/2025/03/31/drone-dome-counter-drone-system-israel/](http://norskluftvern.com/2025/03/31/drone-dome-counter-drone-system-israel/)

<!-- wp:paragraph -->
<p>The Drone Dome, a comprehensive counter-drone system developed by Rafael Advanced Defense Systems.&nbsp;Designed to protect against a wide range of unmanned aerial threats, Drone Dome employs a multi-layered approach, combining radar, electro-optical/infrared sensors, RF jamming, and optional laser capabilities.<sup class="superscript visible">&nbsp;</sup></p>
<!-- /wp:paragraph -->

<!-- wp:separator -->
<hr class="wp-block-separator has-alpha-channel-opacity" />
<!-- /wp:separator -->

<!-- wp:heading {"className":""} -->
<h2 class="wp-block-heading"><strong>System Overview</strong></h2>
<!-- /wp:heading -->

<!-- wp:list -->
<ul class="wp-block-list"><!-- wp:list-item -->
<li><strong>Name:</strong>&nbsp;Drone Dome</li>
<!-- /wp:list-item -->

<!-- wp:list-item -->
<li><strong>Manufacturer:</strong>&nbsp;Rafael Advanced Defense Systems</li>
<!-- /wp:list-item -->

<!-- wp:list-item -->
<li><strong>Country of Origin:</strong>&nbsp;Israel</li>
<!-- /wp:list-item -->

<!-- wp:list-item -->
<li><strong>Type:</strong>&nbsp;Multi-layered counter-drone system (RF jamming, radar, laser)</li>
<!-- /wp:list-item -->

<!-- wp:list-item -->
<li><strong>Intended Use:</strong>&nbsp;Military, homeland security, and critical infrastructure protection against UAV threats</li>
<!-- /wp:list-item --></ul>
<!-- /wp:list -->

<!-- wp:separator -->
<hr class="wp-block-separator has-alpha-channel-opacity" />
<!-- /wp:separator -->

<!-- wp:heading {"className":""} -->
<h2 class="wp-block-heading"><strong>Technical Specifications</strong></h2>
<!-- /wp:heading -->

<!-- wp:list -->
<ul class="wp-block-list"><!-- wp:list-item -->
<li><strong>Detection Capabilities:</strong><!-- wp:list -->
<ul class="wp-block-list"><!-- wp:list-item -->
<li><strong>3D AESA radar</strong>&nbsp;for tracking multiple drones simultaneously</li>
<!-- /wp:list-item -->

<!-- wp:list-item -->
<li><strong>Electro-optical/infrared (EO/IR) sensors</strong>&nbsp;for visual tracking</li>
<!-- /wp:list-item -->

<!-- wp:list-item -->
<li><strong>RF direction-finding sensors</strong>&nbsp;to detect drone communication signals</li>
<!-- /wp:list-item --></ul>
<!-- /wp:list --></li>
<!-- /wp:list-item -->

<!-- wp:list-item -->
<li><strong>Neutralization Method:</strong><!-- wp:list -->
<ul class="wp-block-list"><!-- wp:list-item -->
<li><strong>RF jamming:</strong>&nbsp;Disrupts drone communication and GPS signals</li>
<!-- /wp:list-item -->

<!-- wp:list-item -->
<li><strong>High-energy laser (optional variant):</strong>&nbsp;Burns drones mid-flight</li>
<!-- /wp:list-item --></ul>
<!-- /wp:list --></li>
<!-- /wp:list-item -->

<!-- wp:list-item -->
<li><strong>Effective Range:</strong><!-- wp:list -->
<ul class="wp-block-list"><!-- wp:list-item -->
<li><strong>RF Jamming:</strong>&nbsp;Up to 3–5 km</li>
<!-- /wp:list-item -->

<!-- wp:list-item -->
<li><strong>Laser Variant:</strong>&nbsp;Estimated to be effective within 2 km</li>
<!-- /wp:list-item --></ul>
<!-- /wp:list --></li>
<!-- /wp:list-item -->

<!-- wp:list-item -->
<li><strong>Mobility:</strong><!-- wp:list -->
<ul class="wp-block-list"><!-- wp:list-item -->
<li><strong>Fixed or mobile configuration</strong>, can be vehicle-mounted or deployed at static sites</li>
<!-- /wp:list-item --></ul>
<!-- /wp:list --></li>
<!-- /wp:list-item -->

<!-- wp:list-item -->
<li><strong>Deployment Mode:</strong><!-- wp:list -->
<ul class="wp-block-list"><!-- wp:list-item -->
<li><strong>Automated or manual operation</strong>, depending on the threat level</li>
<!-- /wp:list-item --></ul>
<!-- /wp:list --></li>
<!-- /wp:list-item --></ul>
<!-- /wp:list -->

<!-- wp:separator -->
<hr class="wp-block-separator has-alpha-channel-opacity" />
<!-- /wp:separator -->

<!-- wp:heading {"className":""} -->
<h2 class="wp-block-heading"><strong>Operational Use &amp; Effectiveness</strong></h2>
<!-- /wp:heading -->

<!-- wp:list -->
<ul class="wp-block-list"><!-- wp:list-item -->
<li><strong>Known Deployments:</strong><!-- wp:list -->
<ul class="wp-block-list"><!-- wp:list-item -->
<li><strong>Israel Defense Forces (IDF)</strong></li>
<!-- /wp:list-item -->

<!-- wp:list-item -->
<li><strong>British Armed Forces</strong>&nbsp;(for protecting critical infrastructure)</li>
<!-- /wp:list-item -->

<!-- wp:list-item -->
<li>Used in the&nbsp;<strong>Middle East, Europe, and select NATO operations</strong></li>
<!-- /wp:list-item --></ul>
<!-- /wp:list --></li>
<!-- /wp:list-item -->

<!-- wp:list-item -->
<li><strong>Combat/Field Testing History:</strong><!-- wp:list -->
<ul class="wp-block-list"><!-- wp:list-item -->
<li><strong>Successfully intercepted drones</strong>&nbsp;in operational environments</li>
<!-- /wp:list-item -->

<!-- wp:list-item -->
<li>Demonstrated&nbsp;<strong>high effectiveness against drone swarms</strong></li>
<!-- /wp:list-item --></ul>
<!-- /wp:list --></li>
<!-- /wp:list-item -->

<!-- wp:list-item -->
<li><strong>Effectiveness Against Various Drone Types:</strong><!-- wp:list -->
<ul class="wp-block-list"><!-- wp:list-item -->
<li>Capable of&nbsp;<strong>defeating Group 1, 2, and some Group 3 UAVs</strong></li>
<!-- /wp:list-item -->

<!-- wp:list-item -->
<li>RF jamming is&nbsp;<strong>effective against commercial and military drones</strong></li>
<!-- /wp:list-item --></ul>
<!-- /wp:list --></li>
<!-- /wp:list-item --></ul>
<!-- /wp:list -->

<!-- wp:separator -->
<hr class="wp-block-separator has-alpha-channel-opacity" />
<!-- /wp:separator -->

<!-- wp:heading {"className":""} -->
<h2 class="wp-block-heading"><strong>Notable Features &amp; Advantages</strong></h2>
<!-- /wp:heading -->

<!-- wp:list -->
<ul class="wp-block-list"><!-- wp:list-item -->
<li><strong>Key Strengths:</strong><!-- wp:list -->
<ul class="wp-block-list"><!-- wp:list-item -->
<li><strong>Multi-layered approach</strong>&nbsp;(radar, EO/IR, RF jamming, and laser options)</li>
<!-- /wp:list-item -->

<!-- wp:list-item -->
<li><strong>High success rate against swarm attacks</strong></li>
<!-- /wp:list-item --></ul>
<!-- /wp:list --></li>
<!-- /wp:list-item -->

<!-- wp:list-item -->
<li><strong>Unique Capabilities:</strong><!-- wp:list -->
<ul class="wp-block-list"><!-- wp:list-item -->
<li><strong>Passive detection using RF sensors</strong>, making it stealthy and low-power</li>
<!-- /wp:list-item -->

<!-- wp:list-item -->
<li><strong>Laser option provides silent, kinetic-free interception</strong></li>
<!-- /wp:list-item --></ul>
<!-- /wp:list --></li>
<!-- /wp:list-item -->

<!-- wp:list-item -->
<li><strong>Adaptability &amp; Scalability:</strong><!-- wp:list -->
<ul class="wp-block-list"><!-- wp:list-item -->
<li>Can be&nbsp;<strong>integrated into national air defense systems</strong></li>
<!-- /wp:list-item --></ul>
<!-- /wp:list --></li>
<!-- /wp:list-item --></ul>
<!-- /wp:list -->

<!-- wp:separator -->
<hr class="wp-block-separator has-alpha-channel-opacity" />
<!-- /wp:separator -->

<!-- wp:heading {"className":""} -->
<h2 class="wp-block-heading"><strong>Limitations &amp; Challenges</strong></h2>
<!-- /wp:heading -->

<!-- wp:list -->
<ul class="wp-block-list"><!-- wp:list-item -->
<li><strong>Known Weaknesses:</strong><!-- wp:list -->
<ul class="wp-block-list"><!-- wp:list-item -->
<li><strong>RF jamming has limited range</strong>&nbsp;and can be countered by frequency-hopping drones</li>
<!-- /wp:list-item -->

<!-- wp:list-item -->
<li><strong>Lasers are weather-dependent</strong>&nbsp;and have a relatively short range</li>
<!-- /wp:list-item --></ul>
<!-- /wp:list --></li>
<!-- /wp:list-item -->

<!-- wp:list-item -->
<li><strong>Operational Constraints:</strong><!-- wp:list -->
<ul class="wp-block-list"><!-- wp:list-item -->
<li><strong>Requires constant surveillance</strong>&nbsp;and operator oversight</li>
<!-- /wp:list-item -->

<!-- wp:list-item -->
<li><strong>High-power requirements</strong>&nbsp;for laser variant</li>
<!-- /wp:list-item --></ul>
<!-- /wp:list --></li>
<!-- /wp:list-item -->

<!-- wp:list-item -->
<li><strong>Adversary Countermeasures:</strong><!-- wp:list -->
<ul class="wp-block-list"><!-- wp:list-item -->
<li><strong>Autonomous drones (pre-programmed waypoints)</strong>&nbsp;bypass RF jamming</li>
<!-- /wp:list-item -->

<!-- wp:list-item -->
<li><strong>Hardened drones with RF shielding</strong>&nbsp;may resist jamming attacks</li>
<!-- /wp:list-item --></ul>
<!-- /wp:list --></li>
<!-- /wp:list-item --></ul>
<!-- /wp:list -->

<!-- wp:separator -->
<hr class="wp-block-separator has-alpha-channel-opacity" />
<!-- /wp:separator -->

<!-- wp:heading {"className":""} -->
<h2 class="wp-block-heading"><strong>Future Developments &amp; Upgrades</strong></h2>
<!-- /wp:heading -->

<!-- wp:list -->
<ul class="wp-block-list"><!-- wp:list-item -->
<li><strong>Planned Enhancements:</strong><!-- wp:list -->
<ul class="wp-block-list"><!-- wp:list-item -->
<li><strong>AI-enhanced automation</strong>&nbsp;for autonomous target prioritization</li>
<!-- /wp:list-item -->

<!-- wp:list-item -->
<li><strong>Higher-power lasers</strong>&nbsp;for extended range engagements</li>
<!-- /wp:list-item --></ul>
<!-- /wp:list --></li>
<!-- /wp:list-item -->

<!-- wp:list-item -->
<li><strong>Integration with Other Systems:</strong><!-- wp:list -->
<ul class="wp-block-list"><!-- wp:list-item -->
<li>Can integrate with&nbsp;<strong>Israeli Iron Dome and other air defense networks</strong></li>
<!-- /wp:list-item --></ul>
<!-- /wp:list --></li>
<!-- /wp:list-item -->

<!-- wp:list-item -->
<li><strong>Future Deployment Plans:</strong><!-- wp:list -->
<ul class="wp-block-list"><!-- wp:list-item -->
<li><strong>Expansion to additional NATO forces</strong>&nbsp;and increased use in urban security settings</li>
<!-- /wp:list-item --></ul>
<!-- /wp:list --></li>
<!-- /wp:list-item --></ul>
<!-- /wp:list -->

## Operational Counter-Drone Systems

**Date:** Mon, 31 Mar 2025 16:30:51 +0000  
**Author:** norskluftvern  
**Type:** Post  
**Link:** [http://norskluftvern.com/2025/03/31/operational-counter-drone-systems/](http://norskluftvern.com/2025/03/31/operational-counter-drone-systems/)

<!-- wp:paragraph {"className":""} -->
<p><strong>U.S. Systems</strong></p>
<!-- /wp:paragraph -->

<!-- wp:list -->
<ul class="wp-block-list"><!-- wp:list-item -->
<li><strong><a href="http://norskluftvern.com/coyote-block-2-counter-drone-system-us" target="_blank" rel="noreferrer noopener">Coyote Block 2</a> </strong>(Raytheon)&nbsp;– A kinetic interceptor designed to shoot down drones.</li>
<!-- /wp:list-item -->

<!-- wp:list-item -->
<li><strong><a href="http://norskluftvern.com/epirus-leonidas-counter-drone-system-us" target="_blank" rel="noreferrer noopener">Epirus’ Leonidas</a></strong> (Epirus Inc.)&nbsp;– A high-power microwave system capable of disabling swarms.</li>
<!-- /wp:list-item -->

<!-- wp:list-item -->
<li><strong><a href="http://norskluftvern.com/dronedefender-counter-drone-system-us" target="_blank" rel="noreferrer noopener">DroneDefender</a> </strong>(Dedrone)&nbsp;– A handheld RF jammer used by military and law enforcement.</li>
<!-- /wp:list-item -->

<!-- wp:list-item -->
<li><strong><a href="http://norskluftvern.com/stryker-m-shorad-counter-drone-system-us" target="_blank" rel="noreferrer noopener">Stryker M-SHORAD</a></strong>&nbsp;(Leonardo DRS) – Mounted on an armored vehicle, this system combines a laser, missiles, and a 30mm cannon.</li>
<!-- /wp:list-item --></ul>
<!-- /wp:list -->

<!-- wp:heading {"level":4,"className":""} -->
<h4 class="wp-block-heading"><strong>European Systems</strong></h4>
<!-- /wp:heading -->

<!-- wp:list -->
<ul class="wp-block-list"><!-- wp:list-item -->
<li><strong><a href="http://norskluftvern.com/skywall-100-skywall-300-counter-drone-system-uk" target="_blank" rel="noreferrer noopener">SkyWall 100 &amp; 300</a> </strong>(OpenWorks Engineering, UK)&nbsp;– Net-based capture systems.</li>
<!-- /wp:list-item -->

<!-- wp:list-item -->
<li><strong><a href="http://norskluftvern.com/drone-dome-counter-drone-system-israel" target="_blank" rel="noreferrer noopener">Drone Dome</a> </strong>(Rafael, Israel)&nbsp;– Jams and destroys drones using high-energy lasers.</li>
<!-- /wp:list-item --></ul>
<!-- /wp:list -->

## Sivil Beredskap og Luftvern: To sider av samme sak

**Date:** Tue, 01 Apr 2025 19:00:46 +0000  
**Author:** norskluftvern  
**Type:** Post  
**Link:** [http://norskluftvern.com/2025/04/01/sivil-beredskap-og-luftvern-to-sider-av-samme-sak/](http://norskluftvern.com/2025/04/01/sivil-beredskap-og-luftvern-to-sider-av-samme-sak/)

<!-- wp:paragraph -->
<p>Sivil beredskap og luftvern er to essensielle, men forskjellige, pilarer i Norges nasjonale sikkerhet. De er tett sammenvevd, spesielt innenfor rammen av&nbsp;<strong>Totalforsvaret</strong>. Totalforsvarskonseptet innebærer at hele samfunnets ressurser, både sivile og militære, skal kunne mobiliseres for å forebygge, motstå og håndtere kriser, konflikter og krig.</p>
<!-- /wp:paragraph -->

<!-- wp:paragraph -->
<p><strong>Sivil Beredskap:</strong>&nbsp;Handler om samfunnets evne til å&nbsp;<em>beskytte</em>&nbsp;sivilbefolkningen og&nbsp;<em>opprettholde</em>&nbsp;viktige samfunnsfunksjoner under ulike typer kriser, inkludert krig og luftangrep. Dette omfatter tiltak som varsling av befolkningen, evakuering, tilfluktsrom, sikring av mat-, vann- og energiforsyning, helseberedskap og generell krisehåndtering. Sivilforsvaret er en sentral aktør her.</p>
<!-- /wp:paragraph -->

<!-- wp:paragraph -->
<p><strong>Sammenhengen:</strong>&nbsp;Luftvern er den første forsvarslinjen mot luftangrep. Sivil beredskap er det som trer i kraft for å håndtere konsekvensene&nbsp;<em>dersom</em>&nbsp;luftvernet ikke klarer å stoppe alle trusler, eller for å håndtere de bredere samfunnsmessige utfordringene som en krise eller krig medfører, inkludert trusselen fra luften. Et effektivt luftvern reduserer belastningen på de sivile beredskapsressursene, mens en robust sivil beredskap sikrer at samfunnet kan fungere og befolkningen beskyttes selv om luftangrep skulle finne sted.</p>
<!-- /wp:paragraph -->

<!-- wp:paragraph -->
<p><strong>Historisk Perspektiv</strong></p>
<!-- /wp:paragraph -->

<!-- wp:paragraph -->
<p><strong>Andre Verdenskrig (1940-1945):</strong></p>
<!-- /wp:paragraph -->

<!-- wp:paragraph -->
<p>Norge erfarte brutaliteten av luftkrig med bombing av byer og tettsteder. Luftvernet var i utgangspunktet svakt og ble raskt satt ut av spill mange steder.</p>
<!-- /wp:paragraph -->

<!-- wp:paragraph -->
<p>Behovet for sivil beskyttelse ble prekært. Det "Sivile Luftvern" (forløperen til Sivilforsvaret) ble organisert, ofte med improviserte løsninger. Tilfluktsrom ble bygget i kjellere, og blending av vinduer var påbudt.</p>
<!-- /wp:paragraph -->

<!-- wp:paragraph -->
<p>Erfaringene viste tydelig hvor sårbart et samfunn er uten tilstrekkelig luftvern og organisert sivil beredskap. Samspillet var tydelig: Manglende luftvern førte til et enormt press på de sivile beskyttelsestiltakene.</p>
<!-- /wp:paragraph -->

<!-- wp:paragraph -->
<p><strong>Den Kalde Krigen (ca. 1947-1991):</strong></p>
<!-- /wp:paragraph -->

<!-- wp:paragraph -->
<p>Trusselen om atomkrig og konvensjonelle angrep fra Warszawapakten dominerte. Totalforsvarskonseptet ble utviklet og styrket.</p>
<!-- /wp:paragraph -->

<!-- wp:paragraph -->
<p>Luftforsvaret ble kraftig modernisert og utbygd som en del av NATO-forsvaret, med radarstasjoner, jagerflybaser og etter hvert luftvernmissiler (først Nike, senere NASAMS).</p>
<!-- /wp:paragraph -->

<!-- wp:paragraph -->
<p>Samtidig ble den sivile beredskapen massivt utbygd. Det ble bygget et stort antall offentlige og private tilfluktsrom. Sivilforsvaret ble styrket med materiell og personell. Det var omfattende planverk for evakuering, rasjonering og opprettholdelse av samfunnsfunksjoner.</p>
<!-- /wp:paragraph -->

<!-- wp:paragraph -->
<p>Sammenhengen var institusjonalisert: Luftvernet skulle gi varsel og beskyttelse, mens sivil beredskap (inkl. Sivilforsvaret) skulle håndtere konsekvensene på bakken, inkludert å få folk i tilfluktsrom. Det var jevnlige øvelser der samspillet ble trent.</p>
<!-- /wp:paragraph -->

<!-- wp:paragraph -->
<p><strong>Perioden etter Den Kalde Krigen (1991- ca. 2014):</strong></p>
<!-- /wp:paragraph -->

<!-- wp:paragraph -->
<p>Med Sovjetunionens fall forsvant den definerte trusselen. Fokus skiftet fra invasjonsforsvar til internasjonale operasjoner.</p>
<!-- /wp:paragraph -->

<!-- wp:paragraph -->
<p>Både det militære forsvaret, inkludert luftvernet, og den sivile beredskapen ble bygget ned. Mange tilfluktsrom ble tatt ut av bruk eller fikk mangelfullt vedlikehold. Totalforsvarstankegangen ble svekket.</p>
<!-- /wp:paragraph -->

<!-- wp:paragraph -->
<p>Man så en "fredsdividende" der ressurser ble flyttet til andre formål.</p>
<!-- /wp:paragraph -->

<!-- wp:paragraph -->
<p><strong>Nåtid og Fremtid (Etter 2014/2022):</strong></p>
<!-- /wp:paragraph -->

<!-- wp:paragraph -->
<p>Russlands anneksjon av Krim i 2014, og særlig fullskalainvasjonen av Ukraina i 2022, har dramatisk endret sikkerhetsbildet i Europa.</p>
<!-- /wp:paragraph -->

<!-- wp:paragraph -->
<p>Krigen i Ukraina viser med all tydelighet hvordan moderne krigføring rammer sivilbefolkningen hardt, blant annet gjennom omfattende bruk av missiler og droner mot byer og kritisk infrastruktur (energi, vannforsyning etc.).</p>
<!-- /wp:paragraph -->

<!-- wp:paragraph -->
<p>Dette har ført til en fornyet og presserende bevissthet om behovet for&nbsp;<em>både</em>&nbsp;et troverdig luftvern&nbsp;<em>og</em>&nbsp;en robust sivil beredskap i Norge.</p>
<!-- /wp:paragraph -->

<!-- wp:paragraph -->
<p><strong>Fremtidens behov:</strong></p>
<!-- /wp:paragraph -->

<!-- wp:paragraph -->
<p><strong>Styrket Luftvern:</strong>&nbsp;Norge investerer i moderne jagerfly (F-35) og har et anerkjent luftvernsystem (NASAMS), men det er behov for å styrke luftvernet ytterligere, både i volum og spredning, for å kunne beskytte større deler av landet og kritisk infrastruktur mot et bredere spekter av trusler (inkl. langtrekkende missiler og droner).</p>
<!-- /wp:paragraph -->

<!-- wp:paragraph -->
<p><strong>Gjenoppbygget Sivil Beredskap:</strong>&nbsp;Det er et stort behov for å revitalisere den sivile beredskapen. Dette inkluderer:</p>
<!-- /wp:paragraph -->

<!-- wp:list -->
<ul class="wp-block-list"><!-- wp:list-item -->
<li>Oppgradering og eventuelt nybygging av tilfluktsrom.</li>
<!-- /wp:list-item -->

<!-- wp:list-item -->
<li>Modernisering av varslingssystemer (utover flyalarmen, f.eks. Nødvarsel på mobil).</li>
<!-- /wp:list-item -->

<!-- wp:list-item -->
<li>Styrking av Sivilforsvaret.</li>
<!-- /wp:list-item -->

<!-- wp:list-item -->
<li>Bedre planer for evakuering og sikring av forsyninger.</li>
<!-- /wp:list-item -->

<!-- wp:list-item -->
<li>Økt fokus på&nbsp;<strong>egenberedskap</strong>&nbsp;i befolkningen (at hver husstand kan klare seg selv i noen dager).</li>
<!-- /wp:list-item --></ul>
<!-- /wp:list -->

<!-- wp:paragraph -->
<p><strong>Tettere Integrasjon:</strong>&nbsp;Samspillet mellom Forsvaret (luftvern) og sivil beredskap (kommuner, statsforvaltere, DSB, Sivilforsvaret) må styrkes og øves jevnlig. Varslingskjeder, informasjonsdeling og felles planverk er kritisk. Totalforsvaret må revitaliseres i praksis.</p>
<!-- /wp:paragraph -->

<!-- wp:paragraph -->
<p><strong>Hvordan kan du engasjere deg?</strong></p>
<!-- /wp:paragraph -->

<!-- wp:paragraph -->
<p>Sikkerhet og beredskap er ikke bare myndighetenes ansvar; det er et felles ansvar. Du kan bidra på flere måter:</p>
<!-- /wp:paragraph -->

<!-- wp:list {"ordered":true} -->
<ol class="wp-block-list"><!-- wp:list-item -->
<li><strong>Ta ansvar for egenberedskap:</strong>&nbsp;Sørg for at du og din familie har det dere trenger for å klare dere selv i minst tre døgn ved en krise (vann, mat, medisiner, varmekilde, batteriradio, lommelykt etc.). Se rådene fra Direktoratet for samfunnssikkerhet og beredskap (DSB) på sikkerhverdag.no.</li>
<!-- /wp:list-item -->

<!-- wp:list-item -->
<li><strong>Hold deg informert:</strong>&nbsp;Følg med på informasjon fra pålitelige kilder som DSB, din kommune og nasjonale nyhetsmedier. Vit hvor du finner informasjon og hva du skal gjøre hvis en krise oppstår (f.eks. ved bruk av Nødvarsel på mobil).</li>
<!-- /wp:list-item -->

<!-- wp:list-item -->
<li><strong>Vurder frivillig innsats:</strong>&nbsp;Organisasjoner som Sivilforsvaret, Heimevernet, Røde Kors, Norsk Folkehjelp og andre frivillige redningsorganisasjoner trenger alltid flere engasjerte mennesker. Undersøk mulighetene for å bidra med din tid og kompetanse.</li>
<!-- /wp:list-item -->

<!-- wp:list-item -->
<li><strong>Delta i samfunnsdebatten:</strong>&nbsp;Engasjer deg i diskusjoner om Norges sikkerhet og beredskap. Still krav til politikere lokalt og nasjonalt om å prioritere både luftvern og sivil beredskap. Støtt organisasjoner som jobber for et tryggere samfunn.</li>
<!-- /wp:list-item -->

<!-- wp:list-item -->
<li><strong>Bidra i lokalsamfunnet:</strong>&nbsp;Vær en ressurs i nabolaget ditt. Snakk med naboer om beredskap, og vær villig til å hjelpe andre hvis en krise skulle inntreffe.</li>
<!-- /wp:list-item --></ol>
<!-- /wp:list -->

<!-- wp:paragraph -->
<p>Et robust Norge krever både et skjold i luften og et motstandsdyktig samfunn på bakken. Ved å forstå sammenhengen og bidra der vi kan, styrker vi vår felles trygghet</p>
<!-- /wp:paragraph -->

<!-- wp:image {"id":2927,"sizeSlug":"large"} -->
<figure class="wp-block-image size-large"><img src="https://norskluftvern.wordpress.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/04/img_7274-1.jpg?w=1024" alt="" class="wp-image-2927" /><figcaption class="wp-element-caption"><em>Det norske forsvarskonseptet utgjør en helhetlig tilnærming til forsvar av norsk sikkerhet, i tråd med de sikkerhets- og forsvarspolitiske målene. Forsvarskonseptet og vår samlede forsvarsevne består grunnleggende av tre gjensidig avhengige hovedelementer: Forsvarets egenevne, forsvarsevnen gjennom alliert og regionalt samarbeid og kollektiv avskrekkings- og forsvarsevne i rammen av NATO, og den støtten som kan mønstres fra det sivile samfunn, også i rammen av totalforsvaret. Et bredt omfang av sivile totalforsvarsaktører og mekanismer understøtter både nasjonale og allierte militære styrker som opererer i Norge og norske nærområder. (Prop. 1 S (2024–2025)</em></figcaption></figure>
<!-- /wp:image -->

<!-- wp:paragraph -->
<p></p>
<!-- /wp:paragraph -->

<!-- wp:paragraph -->
<p>KI-støttet artikkel. </p>
<!-- /wp:paragraph -->

## GhostEye MR: Ny multifunksjonsradar med middels rekkevidde og 360° dekning

**Date:** Thu, 03 Apr 2025 21:47:55 +0000  
**Author:** norskluftvern  
**Type:** Post  
**Link:** [http://norskluftvern.com/2025/04/03/ghosteye-mr-ny-multifunksjonsradar-med-middels-rekkevidde-og-360-dekning/](http://norskluftvern.com/2025/04/03/ghosteye-mr-ny-multifunksjonsradar-med-middels-rekkevidde-og-360-dekning/)

<!-- wp:paragraph -->
<p>GhostEye MR-radaren er en avansert luft- og missilforsvarsradar med middels rekkevidde og 360° dekning, utviklet for å oppdage, følge og identifisere et bredt utvalg av trusler som kryssermissiler, droner, fly og helikoptre.</p>
<!-- /wp:paragraph -->

<!-- wp:paragraph -->
<p>GhostEye MR deler fellestrekk med Lower Tier Air and Missile Defense Sensor, eller LTAMDS, som Raytheon bygger for U.S Army. Begge radarene utnytter avansert teknologi som f.eks aktiv elektronisk skannet array, eller AESA – som forbedrer deteksjonsevne og målfølging – og galliumnitrid av militær kvalitet, eller GaN – som styrker radarsignalet og gir lengre rekkevidde, høyere oppløsning og økt kapasitet. I tillegg muliggjør den åpne arkitekturen til LTAMDS og GhostEye MR teknologitilpasninger for å kunne møte nye trusler.</p>
<!-- /wp:paragraph -->

<!-- wp:paragraph -->
<p>Radaren kan fungere som en frittstående radar, men passer også til flere oppdrag som integrert luft- og missilforsvar, droneforsvar og forsvar av kritisk infrastruktur, for eksempel flybaser. Og er en mulig fremtidig ny primær sensor for NASAMS-systemet. Radarens rekkevidde og høydedekning vil sammen med nye missiltyper kunne utvide NASAMS-systemets dekningsområde.</p>
<!-- /wp:paragraph -->

<!-- wp:paragraph -->
<p>GhostEye MR ble avduket i oktober 2021.</p>
<!-- /wp:paragraph -->

<!-- wp:embed {"url":"https://youtu.be/hp1GKoJfbXs?si=BY-UGsjmtEFW6Ifn","type":"video","providerNameSlug":"youtube","responsive":true,"className":"wp-embed-aspect-16-9 wp-has-aspect-ratio"} -->
<figure class="wp-block-embed is-type-video is-provider-youtube wp-block-embed-youtube wp-embed-aspect-16-9 wp-has-aspect-ratio"><div class="wp-block-embed__wrapper">
https://youtu.be/hp1GKoJfbXs?si=BY-UGsjmtEFW6Ifn
</div><figcaption class="wp-element-caption">GhostEye MR radar made by Raytheon Missiles &amp; Defense will counter escalating medium-range threats and fortify layered air and missile defense.</figcaption></figure>
<!-- /wp:embed -->

<!-- wp:paragraph -->
<p>Bilde: RTX</p>
<!-- /wp:paragraph -->

<!-- wp:paragraph -->
<p></p>
<!-- /wp:paragraph -->

## A Wake-Up Call: Europe's Need for Stronger Air Defences

**Date:** Mon, 07 Apr 2025 18:49:56 +0000  
**Author:** norskluftvern  
**Type:** Post  
**Link:** [http://norskluftvern.com/2025/04/07/a-wake-up-call-europes-need-for-stronger-air-defences/](http://norskluftvern.com/2025/04/07/a-wake-up-call-europes-need-for-stronger-air-defences/)

<!-- wp:paragraph -->
<p>In the wake of recent statements from the USA that have cast doubt on the country's continued commitment to European security, several European nations have recently made a series of announcements related to their own defence.</p>
<!-- /wp:paragraph -->

<!-- wp:paragraph -->
<p>The article linked below addresses the understandable reaction this has created in Europe, and argues that a rapid and massive strengthening of European air defence and missile defence is the most pressing task to be able to counter potential Russian aggression independently.</p>
<!-- /wp:paragraph -->

<!-- wp:paragraph -->
<p>Europe faces a real challenge in matching or countering Russia's offensive capabilities. The current state of European air defence and missile defence is significantly underfunded in terms of both the number of deployed systems and the industrial capacity to maintain them. The scale of the necessary increase in defensive resources and production is considerable, requiring a coordinated and rapid effort to close the gap and establish a credible deterrent. Figures suggest that for every type of offensive weapon Russia can field in significant numbers, Europe needs a multiple increase in its defensive capabilities.</p>
<!-- /wp:paragraph -->

<!-- wp:paragraph -->
<p><strong>Offensive firepower vs. defensive capacity</strong></p>
<!-- /wp:paragraph -->

<!-- wp:paragraph -->
<p>Three years after a real cessation of hostilities, Russia is estimated to have the ability to have re-established a weapons stockpile of thousands of ballistic and cruise missiles and a huge number of attack drones.</p>
<!-- /wp:paragraph -->

<!-- wp:paragraph -->
<p>Europe currently has fewer than 50 long-range anti-ballistic batteries, around 100 medium-range, and 200 short-range batteries to counter this. This suggests a significant numerical imbalance favoring Russia's offensive capabilities.</p>
<!-- /wp:paragraph -->

<!-- wp:paragraph -->
<p><strong>Production rate vs. need</strong></p>
<!-- /wp:paragraph -->

<!-- wp:paragraph -->
<p>Russia's annual production of key missiles (Iskander-M, Kh-101, Kalibr) is in the hundreds, and attack drones in the thousands.</p>
<!-- /wp:paragraph -->

<!-- wp:paragraph -->
<p>Europe needs to produce over 1500 anti-ballistic missiles, over 1200 medium-range missiles, and over 5000 short-range missiles annually just to potentially match the threat and replenish stockpiles. This highlights a significant industrial production gap that needs to be closed.</p>
<!-- /wp:paragraph -->

<!-- wp:paragraph -->
<p><strong>Necessary increase in European defence</strong></p>
<!-- /wp:paragraph -->

<!-- wp:paragraph -->
<p>Europe needs to more than double (2.5 times) its current number of long-range, medium-range, and short-range air defence systems to represent a credible threshold. This is a huge task in terms of procurement and deployment.</p>
<!-- /wp:paragraph -->

<!-- wp:paragraph -->
<p><a href="https://meta-defense.fr/en/2025/04/06/defense-antiaerienne-europenne-2025/?fbclid=IwZXh0bgNhZW0CMTEAAR4Izw3iqOfUmPTKDmKWTsEmFhbHouyc4RCmEwh9c8LLiadh9YwQdW2tePDaDg_aem_3YC63rV_iQ8aDaO3c8fPKA" target="_blank" rel="noreferrer noopener">Why is anti-aircraft and anti-ballistic defence the top priority for Europeans from 2025? [meta-defense.fr]</a></p>
<!-- /wp:paragraph -->

<!-- wp:paragraph -->
<p>Image: AI</p>
<!-- /wp:paragraph -->

---

## Et varsku: Europa må bygge opp sitt luftforsvar

**Date:** Mon, 07 Apr 2025 18:58:48 +0000  
**Author:** norskluftvern  
**Type:** Post  
**Link:** [http://norskluftvern.com/2025/04/07/et-varsku-europa-ma-bygge-opp-sitt-luftforsvar/](http://norskluftvern.com/2025/04/07/et-varsku-europa-ma-bygge-opp-sitt-luftforsvar/)

<!-- wp:paragraph {"className":"query-text-line ng-star-inserted"} -->
<p class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted">I kjølvannet av nylige uttalelser fra USA som har sådd tvil om landets fortsatte engasjement i europeisk sikkerhet, har flere europeiske nasjoner den siste tiden kommet med en rekke kunngjøringer knyttet til eget forsvar. </p>
<!-- /wp:paragraph -->

<!-- wp:paragraph {"className":"query-text-line ng-star-inserted"} -->
<p class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted">Artikkelen linket under tar for seg den forståelige reaksjonen dette har skapt i Europa, og argumenterer for at en rask og massiv styrking av europeisk luftvern og missilforsvar er den mest presserende oppgaven for å kunne møte en potensiell russisk aggresjon på egen hånd.&nbsp;</p>
<!-- /wp:paragraph -->

<!-- wp:paragraph {"className":"query-text-line ng-star-inserted"} -->
<p class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted">Europa står overfor en reell utfordring når det gjelder å matche eller motvirke Russlands offensive kapasiteter. Den nåværende tilstanden til europeisk luftvern og missilforsvar er betydelig underfinansiert både når det gjelder antall utplasserte systemer og den industrielle kapasiteten til å opprettholde dem. Omfanget av den nødvendige økningen i defensive ressurser og produksjon er betydelig, og krever en samordnet og rask innsats for å tette gapet og etablere en troverdig avskrekking. Tallene antyder at for hver type offensivt våpen Russland kan stille med i betydelig antall, trenger Europa en mangedobling av sine defensive kapasiteter.&nbsp;</p>
<!-- /wp:paragraph -->

<!-- wp:paragraph {"className":"query-text-line ng-star-inserted"} -->
<p class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"><strong>Offensiv ildkraft vs. defensiv kapasitet</strong></p>
<!-- /wp:paragraph -->

<!-- wp:paragraph {"className":"query-text-line ng-star-inserted"} -->
<p class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted">Tre år etter en reell stans av krigføringen er Russland anslått å ha mulighet til å ha reetablert en våpenbeholdning på tusenvis av ballistiske missiler og kryssermissiler og et enormt antall angrepsdroner.&nbsp;&nbsp;</p>
<!-- /wp:paragraph -->

<!-- wp:paragraph {"className":"query-text-line ng-star-inserted"} -->
<p class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted">Europa har for tiden færre enn 50 langtrekkende anti-ballistiske batterier, rundt 100 middelsrekkende og 200 kortholdsbatterier for å motvirke dette. Dette antyder en betydelig numerisk ubalanse som favoriserer Russlands offensive kapasiteter.&nbsp;</p>
<!-- /wp:paragraph -->

<!-- wp:paragraph {"className":"query-text-line ng-star-inserted"} -->
<p class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"><strong>Produksjonstakt vs. behov</strong></p>
<!-- /wp:paragraph -->

<!-- wp:paragraph {"className":"query-text-line ng-star-inserted"} -->
<p class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted">Russlands årlige produksjon av viktige missiler (Iskander-M, Kh-101, Kalibr) er i hundrevis, og angrepsdroner i tusenvis.&nbsp;</p>
<!-- /wp:paragraph -->

<!-- wp:paragraph {"className":"query-text-line ng-star-inserted"} -->
<p class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted">Europa trenger å produsere over 1500 anti-ballistiske missiler, over 1200 middelsrekkende missiler og over 5000 kortholdsmissiler årlig bare for potensielt å matche trusselen og fylle opp lagrene. Dette fremhever et betydelig industrielt produksjonsgap som må tettes.&nbsp;</p>
<!-- /wp:paragraph -->

<!-- wp:paragraph {"className":"query-text-line ng-star-inserted"} -->
<p class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"><strong>Nødvendig økning i europeisk forsvar</strong></p>
<!-- /wp:paragraph -->

<!-- wp:paragraph {"className":"query-text-line ng-star-inserted"} -->
<p class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted">Europa trenger å mer enn doble (2,5 ganger) sitt nåværende antall langtrekkende, middelsrekkende og kortholds luftvernsystemer for å representere en troverdig terskel. Dette er en enorm oppgave når det gjelder anskaffelser og utplassering.</p>
<!-- /wp:paragraph -->

<!-- wp:paragraph -->
<p>Bildet: KI</p>
<!-- /wp:paragraph -->

<!-- wp:paragraph -->
<p><a href="https://meta-defense.fr/en/2025/04/06/defense-antiaerienne-europenne-2025/?fbclid=IwZXh0bgNhZW0CMTEAAR4Izw3iqOfUmPTKDmKWTsEmFhbHouyc4RCmEwh9c8LLiadh9YwQdW2tePDaDg_aem_3YC63rV_iQ8aDaO3c8fPKA" target="_blank" rel="noreferrer noopener">Why is anti-aircraft and anti-ballistic defence the top priority for Europeans from 2025? [meta-defense.fr]</a></p>
<!-- /wp:paragraph -->
